title: Parts Feeding Testing Feeder Cal Results
description:
Parts Feeding Testing Feeder Cal Results

Testing Feeder Calibration Results

Click the Test button described in 2.3.8.  Calibration to test feeder calibration results.

Item	Description

Flip and Separate	Selects the flip and separate test.

Short axis centering	Selects the centering test in the direction of short axis.

(left to right on the screen above).

Long axis centering	Selects the centering test in the direction of long axis.

(up and down on the screen above).

Shift forward	Selects the forward shift test.

Parts will travel towards the direction of travel in the parts area set using the Pick Region setting on the Pick screen.

Shift backward	Selects the backward shift test.

Parts will travel away from the direction of travel in the parts area set using the Pick Region setting on the Pick screen.

Purge	Selects purge test.

(1) Select an item to test.

(2) Click the <Start> button.

Note:  If calibrated values have been changed using the "Manually edit calibration parameters" option and applied by clicking the <Apply> button before running this test, the updated values will be used for testing.

If the test is run without clicking the <Apply> button, the pre-updated values will be used for testing.

Calibration items that can be tested will vary depending on selections made in the Part Feeding dialog.
